title: Figure 1. Data collection and analyses
right_caption: Data analysis: publication trends, source distribution, collaboration networks, topic modeling, and citation analysis

strategy_boxes.text:
Strategy one (database search):
Web of Science, PubMed, and Scopus
(N=12480)

Strategy two (additional search):
publications in Medical Education, Academic Medicine, Medical Teacher, and AMEE conference proceedings
(N=916)

total_box:
Total publications retrieved from database search and additional search
(N=13396)
manual_box:
Publications included for manual screening and filtering
(N=6840)
citation_box: Collect the number of citations received by each publication in Google Scholar
analysis_steps: Trend analysis of annual publications in AI-driven medical education
Identification of leading journals, countries/regions, and institutions
Topic identification, research hotspot mapping, and trend evolution analyses
